description: Navigate to the homepage at https://hmx-accountants.netlify.app
Verify the hamburger menu button with aria-label 'Open mobile menu' is present in the page header
Click the hamburger menu button labelled 'Open mobile menu' in the header
Verify the mobile navigation drawer slides open and displays navigation links including Services, Pricing, About, and Contact inside the drawer panel
Click the Close menu button inside the mobile navigation drawer
Verify the mobile navigation drawer is no longer visible on screen after being closed
